# INTERLIGENS — static fallback robots (SEC-008)
# The authoritative robots file is generated by src/app/robots.ts. This static
# copy exists for crawlers that fetch public/robots.txt without following the
# Next.js route. Keep the two in sync.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /en/admin/
Disallow: /fr/admin/
Disallow: /investigators/
Disallow: /access/
Disallow: /box/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /health
Disallow: /shared/case/
